goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
The train should 'leave after 11:30' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'the cambridge corn exchange'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'entrance fee'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stansted airport
The train should leave after 11:30 and should leave on sunday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called the cambridge corn exchange
Make sure you get attraction type and entrance fee
